name: Zotero
description: Zotero is a useful research management surface inside Religion & Belief Systems.
whyUseIt: People in Religion & Belief Systems use Zotero to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Zotero as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Zotero.
